sections.heading: PCBWay Fabrication Toolkit for Kicad
sections.text: Blog > PCBWay Fabrication Toolkit for Kicad PCBWay Fabrication Toolkit for Kicad by: PCBWay Oct 11,2023 15194 Views 2 Comments Posted in News Recently, PCBWay added a plug-in called PCBWay Fabrication Toolkit to Kicad: With just one click of the mouse, four files can be exported from the layout file automatically: Gerber file, IPC-Netlist file, BOM file and Pick and Place file, which can significantly improves the efficiency of pre-production work. Installation from the Official KiCad Repositories After installation, the plugin will appear on the right side of the navigation bar. And users can use it to export all the production files with just a click. Process demonstration： Sending the fi...

sections.heading: Installation from the Official KiCad Repositories
sections.text: Recently, PCBWay added a plug-in called PCBWay Fabrication Toolkit to Kicad: With just one click of the mouse, four files can be exported from the layout file automatically: Gerber file, IPC-Netlist file, BOM file and Pick and Place file, which can significantly improves the efficiency of pre-production work. Installation from the Official KiCad Repositories After installation, the plugin will appear on the right side of the navigation bar. And users can use it to export all the production files with just a click. Process demonstration： Sending the files to PCBWay, and they can be used for production after being reviewed by the staff. Note: If you want to place an assembly order, please be...
